creator: vova@fbsd.ru
text:
Quite trivial new config - not work et all:

$ cat /usr/local/etc/snmp_exporter/snmp.yml
modules:
  mikrotik:
    version: 2c
    auth:
      community: public
    walk:
      - 1.3.6.1.2.1.1
      - 1.3.6.1.2.1.2
      - 1.3.6.1.4.1.14988
$

# su -m nobody
% /usr/bin/env /usr/local/bin/snmp_exporter     --web.listen-address=:9116     --config.file=/usr/local/etc/snmp_exporter/snmp.yml
time=2025-05-12T22:17:16.313Z level=INFO source=main.go:211 msg="Starting snmp_exporter" version="(version=, branch=, revision=unknown)" concurrency=0x8700c8120 debug_snmp=0x8700c8128
time=2025-05-12T22:17:16.313Z level=INFO source=main.go:212 msg="operational information" build_context="(go=go1.23.1, platform=freebsd/amd64, user=, date=, tags=unknown)"
time=2025-05-12T22:17:16.313Z level=ERROR source=main.go:219 msg="Error parsing config file" err="yaml: unmarshal errors:\n  line 3: field version not found in type config.plain\n  line 4: field auth not found in type config.plain"
time=2025-05-12T22:17:16.313Z level=ERROR source=main.go:220 msg="Possible version missmatch between generator and snmp_exporter. Make sure generator and snmp_exporter are the same version."
time=2025-05-12T22:17:16.313Z level=ERROR source=main.go:221 msg="See also: https://github.com/prometheus/snmp_exporter/blob/main/auth-split-migration.md"


What was the point not enable AUTH_SPLIT?
